failures.description: The agent incorrectly concluded that item 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest, even though the tool result showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor used that tool output but selected the higher-priced second item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output, so the failure is a misinterpretation of tool output. The Evaluator at index 5 did not resolve it and instead approved the incorrect answer.
